task: #559 daily DOY-sensitivity launch-epoch sweep on the #327 SILVER under V4-strict

v4_strict_model.spice_kernel_source: JPL/NAIF generic_kernels/spk/satellites/a_old_versions/ura111.bsp; 5 classical Uranian moons + Uranus + Earth + Sun, 1900-2099 ET

sweep_params.sampling_note: Daily resolution across two year-long windows to resolve whether the June-21 PASS from #338 sits in a wide tolerant band or on a knife-edge boundary. Windows bracket known FAIL (2000-01-15) and PASS (2000-06-21 / 2030-06-21) reference points.

next_step: analyze pass/fail pattern by day-of-year across both 2000 and 2030 windows
